project_readout.summary: This master view treats task blocks 1-4 as the current stage. If all four are at least moderately closed, the project should stop adding bridge dashboards and move to the next hard stage: turning brain-side and structure-side evidence into a trainable unified law under online pressure.
project_readout.next_question: The next stage should fuse task blocks 2-4: use the unified law as the base, add brain-side penalties, and test whether online real-model metrics remain stable rather than being optimized separately.
